SELECT

    COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, 
    AVG(transaction_amount) AS average_amount
FROM 
    transactions

    merchant_id

    ABS(average_amount - (SELECT AVG(transaction_amount) FROM transactions)) DESC
LIMIT 3
